results.title: Learn how to handle 429 resource exhaustion errors in your LLMs | Google Cloud Blog
results.description: Backoff and retry mechanisms should be combined with dynamic shared quota, especially as request volume and token size increase. During our testing of the -002 model with larger video input, we encountered 429 errors in all our initial attempts. However, the test results below demonstrate that incorporating backoff and retry logic allowed all five subsequent attempts to succeed. This highlights the necessity of this strategy for the newer -002 Gemini model to be consistently successful.
